rule: first 65% of each standardized stream; normalization and readouts fit here only
last 35% of each standardized stream; no model, threshold, or hyperparameter changes after viewing
final quartile of the test suffix; used for late-run stability and forgetting diagnostics
public training units/streams only; used for thresholds, costs, and candidate selection
held-out units/streams/windows not used for same-subset policy selection
